title: ZXBrick Game Modes
description: Compare gameplay modes and decide which setup to use for training or scoring sessions.
summary: Choose the right mode pattern for your goal: consistency training or focused scoring progression.

sections.heading: Available modes
paragraphs: ZXBrick focuses on a single-player progression loop for the documented modes.
Use mode choice to match your objective: clean practice rounds for consistency or longer sessions for score growth.

sections.heading: How to select a mode
paragraphs: Use short sessions for control tuning and longer sessions for achievement-oriented progression.
Keep mode intent stable for at least one run cluster so results remain comparable.

faq.question: How do I choose the right mode for practice?
faq.answer: Use a short, low-pressure session for control training and switch to a longer score-focused session once controls feel stable.
